query.sql:
SELECT '1-采购' as stage, COUNT(*) as count, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as amount FROM nb_erp_purchase_orders WHERE status NOT IN ('已取消','草稿')
UNION ALL SELECT '2-生产' as stage, COUNT(*) as count, 0 as amount FROM nb_erp_work_orders WHERE status NOT IN ('已关闭')
UNION ALL SELECT '3-销售' as stage, COUNT(*) as count, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as amount FROM nb_erp_sales_orders WHERE status NOT IN ('已取消','草稿')
UNION ALL SELECT '4-发货' as stage, COUNT(*) as count, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as amount FROM nb_erp_sales_orders WHERE status IN ('已发货','已签收')
ORDER BY stage
